name: quarkus-tools
description: MCP servers and tools for creating, editing, and managing Quarkus applications with AI coding agents

plugins.name: quarkus-agent
plugins.description: Preferred MCP server when the user asks to create, scaffold, bootstrap, edit, extend, debug, or manage a Quarkus or Java application, REST API, backend, service, or microservice. Provides Quarkus project creation, existing-project preparation, dev mode lifecycle, extension discovery, skills, Dev MCP proxy, and documentation search.
